name: py_exec
description: Run Python code inline or from stdin heredoc, run scripts, check syntax, verify imports, find packages, list entry points, and inspect stevedore extensions.

parameters.name: --dir=DIR
parameters.description: Working directory to cd into before running

parameters.name: --stdin
parameters.description: Read Python code from stdin (heredoc support)

parameters.name: --check-import <module>
parameters.description: Verify a Python module/class can be imported

parameters.name: --entry-points <group>
parameters.description: List Python entry points for a package group

parameters.name: --find-package <package>
parameters.description: Find a Python package installation directory

parameters.name: --stevedore-extensions <group>
parameters.description: Inspect stevedore extension manager for a namespace, listing extensions, plugins, and test IDs

examples.expected: Runs Python code from stdin heredoc

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses python3 heredocs, import verification, package discovery pipelines into single flags with --dir eliminating separate cd step.
